name: WebDMMbrAccumRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT RUN_CYC_SK, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, 'Y' AS CDM_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBER_ACCUM' AND CYC_STTUS_CD = 'FINISHED' AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle}) UPDATE target SET target.CDM_LOAD_IN = cte_source.CDM_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC target INNER JOIN cte_source ON target.RUN_CYC_SK = cte_source.RUN_CYC_SK AND target.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte_source.TRGT_SYS_CD AND target.SRC_SYS_CD = cte_source.SRC_SYS_CD AND target.SUBJ_CD = cte_source.SUBJ_CD

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

PROCESSING:  Update the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE field CDM_LOAD_IN so these records are not re-extracted the next time IdsMbrAccumDataMartCntl runs

Annotations:
Job Name;
WebDMMbrAccumRunCycUpd_EE
Read all the Data from IDS P_RUN_CYC Table; 
Pull records based on ExtractRunCycle
MBR_ACCUM
Set CDM_LOAD_IN to Y for SUBJ_CD = ''MBR_ACCUM'' and TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS'
Update P_RUN_CYC table
